biography: Ishana Night Shyamalan is an American director, and writer. The daughter of acclaimed director M. Night Shyamalan, Ishana graduated from NYU's Tisch School of the Arts, and cut her teeth directing music videos, producing short films, and acting as a co-writer/co-director on episodes of Apple TV's Servant (2019-2023).
name: Ishana Night Shyamalan
